data.title: Chiquita partners with artist Jiaqi Wang for third year of Pop by Nature campaign, bringing fresh creativity to fruit.
data.description: In Fort Lauderdale, Florida on February 16, 2026, the renowned fruit company Chiquita has unveiled the third edition of its seasonal creative campaign, Pop by Nature. This year, the campaign features a vibrant infusion of color, creativity, and personality. Partnering with artist Jiaqi Wang, the new campaign aims to bring a fresh perspective to the world's most recognizable fruit.

data.title: Dow Jones Futures up on Presidents Day, S&P 500 and Nasdaq below 50-day lines. Tech giants like Apple, Google, Amazon, Meta, Nvidia in focus.
data.description: Futures saw an increase while U.S. markets were shut for Presidents Day. The S&P 500 and Nasdaq are currently trading below their 50-day averages. However, certain tech giants such as Apple, Google, Amazon, Meta, and Nvidia are influencing an underlying strength in the market. Dow Jones Futures have surged in this context.

data.title: Riyadh Air Metropolitano Stadium upgrades with self-driving network by HPE for better fan experience. Major tech overhaul for 2 seasons brings digitalization to sports infrastructures in Europe.
data.description: In Madrid, the Riyadh Air Metropolitano Stadium, the home of Atlético de Madrid, is upgrading its technology with a cutting-edge self-driving network infrastructure using HPE Networking solutions. The initiative, spanning two phases across the 2025/26 and 2026/27 seasons, aims to revamp the stadium's communication system, signaling a significant step in the digital transformation of sports facilities in Europe. This modernization project is poised to elevate the stadium's tech capabilities as it embraces a new era of sports infrastructure digitization.

data.title: Cloudvirga partners with Optimal Blue to offer real-time pricing info in their Loan Hub, aiding in quicker loan processing.
data.description: Cloudvirga, a company based in Irvine, California, and owned by Stewart, has revealed a new partnership with Optimal Blue's product and pricing engine (PPE). This integration allows for real-time access to pricing and eligibility information within Cloudvirga's Loan Hub platform. Users can now generate pricing scenarios for consumers at the early stage of a loan application as well as during the processing of an active loan. The Loan Hub serves as a centralized tool for origination teams to oversee pipelines, engage with borrowers, and collaborate effectively. This advancement streamlines the loan origination process and enhances customer experience.

data.title: Children's Milestone expands in-home ABA therapy services across VA, MD, and D.C. to assist families during spring IEP season.
data.description: Children's Milestone, a top provider of in-home Applied Behavior Analysis (ABA) therapy, is increasing its clinical capacity in Virginia, Maryland, and Washington, D.C. as spring approaches. The expansion aims to cater to growing demand for therapy services in the region. This move is part of the company's strategic plan to enhance services and reach more families in need.

data.title: Hawaiian Bros opens first Glenwood, IL location, expanding Chicagoland reach. Fast-growing chain aims to bring island-inspired cuisine to more customers.
data.description: Popular island-themed dining establishment, Hawaiian Bros, is extending its "Ohana" to Glenwood, Illinois, marking its inaugural island-inspired site in the area. The opening, which occurred on February 16, 2026, signifies the chain's expansion within the Chicagoland region. Known for its rapid growth, Hawaiian Bros continues its success by introducing its unique dining experience to a new community.

data.title: New book "Ben Franklin 2026" by Robert L. Merz highlights Franklin's wisdom for USA's 250th anniversary.
data.description: In Northfield, New Jersey, on February 16, 2026, Values of America Publishing revealed the launch of "Ben Franklin 2026: His Views of America and the World" by Robert L. Merz. Coming at the time of the United States' semiquincentennial, this book explores the insights of Benjamin Franklin. Emphasizing the significance of his perspectives, the book delves into the essence of American values and their global context, offering a timely reflection on the nation's ideals and their relevance as it commemorates its 250th anniversary.

data.title: Dresner Advisory Services releases 2026 Workforce Planning and Analysis Market Study, showing rising importance with strong demand.
data.description: The significance of workforce planning and analysis has grown steadily year after year, with a high demand observed across enterprises of various sizes. A recent report by Dresner Advisory Services revealed that the 2026 Workforce Planning and Analysis Market Study highlighted this trend. The study, part of the Wisdom of Crowds® series, indicated a strong interest in this area, as reflected by robust numbers across the industry. This suggests that companies are increasingly recognizing the value and necessity of strategic workforce planning in optimizing their operations.

data.title: Study links antioxidant intake to lower female infertility rates, providing comprehensive nutritional support for those managing infertility and PCOS.
data.description: In February 16, 2026 at FORT LAUDERDALE, Fla., Healthy Fertility provides full nutritional support for individuals dealing with infertility and PCOS, especially during the fresh start of the New Year. This time of year is crucial for those attempting pregnancy with a significant number of people focused on conceiving.

data.title: Korea Univ, Stanford Univ, and IESGA unite to combat ESG greenwashing, launch Water Sustainability Index on Feb 16, 2026.
data.description: In Seoul, South Korea, on February 16, 2026, a surge in corporate dedication to achieving environmental, social, and governance (ESG) objectives is evident. Despite this trend, water management continues to be a significant oversight. Professor Yong Sik Ok from Korea University, also serving as President, has been stressing the importance of this issue. Awareness about incorporating water-related considerations within ESG strategies is vital as companies strive to meet sustainability goals. This highlights a critical area for improvement as organizations prioritize sustainability efforts.

data.title: Hanyang Univ. ERICA researchers find key mechanism driving fatty liver disease to cancer. implicating ER stress & unfolded protein response.
data.description: In South Korea's Gyeonggi Province on February 16, 2026, a recent report highlighted the connection between endoplasmic reticulum (ER) stress and the unfolded protein response in the advancement of metabolic dysfunction-associated steatotic liver disease (MASLD). This research sheds light on the progression from simple steatosis to inflammation-driven metabolic complications. The study underscores the importance of understanding these mechanisms in order to address and potentially prevent MASLD.

data.title: Dr. Green Services advises Texas homeowners on critical lawn care timing in February, PRNewswire, Feb 16, 2026.
data.description: Taking action early is crucial in preventing spring weeds and improving turf health in North Texas. In Dallas and Fort Worth, Texas, Dr. Green Services emphasizes the significance of proactive measures. As of February 16, 2026, they highlight the importance of addressing spring weed issues before they become problematic. By taking steps now, residents can ensure a healthier lawn throughout the season. The initiative aims to combat weed growth and enhance the resilience of turf. This preventive approach can significantly benefit the local community, with a focus on improving the overall aesthetic of properties in the region.

Central Banks Ramp Up Gold Holdings Amid Surging Prices Since 2020, as gold jumped over 230%, central banks have launched a major buying spree. The top 15 buyers added nearly 2,000 tonnes over five years.
- China led with +350 tonnes, diversifying away from the U.S. dollar. -

data.title: ElevatePFS acquires Centauri Health Solutions' Health Systems Services division, expanding service offerings in revenue cycle management.
data.description: On February 16, 2026, in Houston, Elevate Patient Financial Solutions® (ElevatePFS), a prominent revenue cycle management partner for health systems across the country, successfully finalized the acquisition of Centauri Health Solutions' Health Systems Services division. This strategic move strengthens ElevatePFS's position in the market and enhances its service offerings. The deal marks a significant milestone for ElevatePFS, further solidifying its reputation in the industry.

data.title: CNT Foundations in South Carolina reaches milestone of 10,000 successful foundation repairs after 25 years in business.
data.description: A foundation repair company based in South Carolina, CNT Foundations, located in Charleston, SC, recently celebrated a significant milestone with the completion of 10,000 successful projects. Over a span of 25 years, the company has established itself as an expert in serving the local community and has built a strong reputation for its services.
Putin has included Moscow Mayor Sobyanin in the composition of the Russian Federation's Military-Industrial Commission, according to the decree.
